questions.question: Choose the correct synonym of the word 'Rapid'.
questions.explanation: 'Rapid' means happening quickly. 'Fast' is the closest synonym.

questions.question: Select the correct antonym of 'Generous'.
questions.explanation: 'Generous' means willing to give. 'Selfish' is the opposite.

questions.question: Fill in the blank: She has been working here _____ 2018.
questions.explanation: 'Since' is used with a specific point in time (2018).

questions.question: Identify the part of speech of the underlined word: He runs very fast.
questions.explanation: 'Fast' describes how he runs, so it functions as an adverb.

questions.question: Choose the correct sentence.
questions.explanation: With 'doesn't', the base form of the verb (like) is used.

questions.question: Select the correct meaning of the idiom 'Break the ice'.
questions.explanation: 'Break the ice' means to initiate conversation in a social setting.

questions.question: Choose the correct passive form: They completed the work.
options: The work is completed by them.
The work was completed by them.
The work has completed by them.
questions.answer: The work was completed by them.
questions.explanation: Past tense active sentence changes to 'was completed' in passive voice.

questions.question: Fill in the blank: He is good _____ mathematics.
questions.explanation: The correct preposition used with 'good' for subjects is 'at'.

questions.question: Choose the correct indirect speech: She said, 'I am tired.'
options: She said that she is tired.
She said that she was tired.
She says that she was tired.
questions.answer: She said that she was tired.
questions.explanation: In indirect speech, present tense changes to past tense when reporting in the past.
